title: Mansherry Is Found
description: Pages 3–7 focus on mansherry is found, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Cavendish, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as mansherry's healing power becomes crucial as Leo and the allies fight to save her from the palace.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WH... who the hell is that guy?!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: Cabbage on the rampage!?

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: His clothes and everything are just like that cabbage bastard, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: His face is someone else's!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That little, horned Turd...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And all the enemy soldiers as well...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: UGGHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHH

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Damn it! Delinger!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: He took 'em all out!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: This is the exact same shit that hap- pened in the colossseum's 3D block!

dialogue.speaker: Sai
dialogue.text: "For some reason, all of them have just... collapsed!" That's what that annoucer guy said if I'm not mistaken...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: that sure was fast...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What just happened!? I couldn't see a friggin' thing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: So it was all this guy's doing, eh?

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: His clothes are certainly those of Cavendish, but that face is some other & dudendish!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Who could that post-sibly be- English?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: AYAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: That scared the shit out ofme! This fucker is so fast I can't even keep track of him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What the hell are you playing at, dude? What happened to you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: There's such a thing as taking a joke too far...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Oi! What the hell did you just glance at?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: You better not be planning some crazy, off-the-wall shit!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: STOO- OOOP-PPP!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Don't you dare touch Robin- Senpai~

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: I'm afraid that's not going to work. Speed is useless against me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: You've definitely gotten a bit more... Melan- Choly since we last talked...

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: Whatever is the matter, Cavendish- Kun?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Someone should

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: I'm worried about Rebecca so I'm in a bit of a rush at the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: WhoAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Amazing! She stopped him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: That someone like me could actually presume to protect you... How foolish of me!?

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Robin ZenPay..

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: Wait just a minute, Hakuba!

dialogue.speaker: Sai
dialogue.text: I never said it was okay...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: For you to come out!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: That was close! My apologies, nice Robin. I was about to kill you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Anyone seems

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: So that just now was the Hakuba I've heard so much about... sleep- walking, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Haa... Haa... I'm afraid so. He's quite the bothersome fellow. Just hacks and kills every- thing around him indiscriminately...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Ugh!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Your ARMS, YOUR LEGS AND, YES, YOUR NECK! I'LL CARE THEM TO SHREDS! NICO Robin!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: I shall cleave through all!

summary: Mansherry Is Found advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Cavendish, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
